chapter_title.en: Instructions for Malik al-Ashtar upon his appointment as the governor of Egypt

parts.text: وَالْعِيَّ، وَنَحِّ عَنْهُمُ الضِّيقَ وَالْأَنَفَ، يَبْسُطِ اللهُ عَلَيْكَ بِذَلِكَ أَكْنَافَ رَحْمَتِهِ، وَيُوجِبُ لَكَ ثَوَابَ طَاعَتِهِ، وَأَعْطِ مَا أَعْطَيْتَ هَنِيئاً، وَامْنَعْ

en.sayed-ali-raza: Tolerate their awkwardness and inability to speak. Keep away from you narrowness and haughtiness; Allāh would, on this account, spread over you the skirts of His mercy and assign the reward of His obedience for you. Whatever you give, give it joyfully, but when you refuse, do it handsomely and with excuses.
